extortion.description: JVCKENWOOD (Thailand) Co., Ltd. is an overseas subsidiary of JVCKENWOOD Corporation based in Thailand, specialising in being a sole distributor of Kenwood audio products, marketing of JVC audio and video products. JVCKENWOOD (Thailand) Co. corporate office is located 240/33, 240/35 Ayothaya Tower, 18th Floor, Ratchadapisek Soi 18 Road, Huaykwang Bangkok, Bangkok, 10310, Thailand
